series_metadata.series_description: Application for licensure/certification remains incomplete for more than one (1) year.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 2 years or after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released, whichever is later, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years or after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released, whichever is later, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
